title: Good Samaritan Drug Overdose Act: poster - Canada.ca
content:
## Good Samaritan Drug Overdose Act: poster

## Suspect an Overdose?
- Stay and Call 911 or your local emergency number
- The Good Samaritan law can protect you from simple drug possession charges.
- Learn more at Canada.ca/Opioids
- Together we can #StopOverdoses
Drugs: Get the facts. Know the risks.
Learn more at Canada.ca/Opioids
Download the alternative format (PDF format, 2.0 MB, 1 page)
- About the Good Samaritan Drug Overdose Act
